name: Memoir
long_description:
Autonomous AI marketing service for software companies. We turn your real product into content and demo videos in your voice automatically. Think of it as a clone of you that's also marketing your company at the same time.

Memoir is a marketer with the soul of an engineer. It reads through all your product development tooling like GitHub, Linear, Slack, etc and identifies the story behind the product. 

For the social side, we monitor what's actually getting traction in your space right now. The threads going viral on dev-tools X, the posts climbing on HN, the formats your audience is engaging with this week, and we draft posts in your writing voice that ride those currents.

You review everything before it goes out. Our system is self learning, so over time, it tracks your edits and sees what posts do well, so those can be surfaced again. The output becomes indistinguishable from how you'd write and record it yourself, if you had the time and a full marketing team behind you.
